base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_white_skeleton_walk — a character from 1986 castlevania. White skeleton — 2-frame walk. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: White skeleton — 2-frame walk; weakest skeleton; dies to single whip hit. Appears in catacombs. Levels 5-6
